phasePlan.objective: Keep route-progress and route-cargo DSK consumption playable while blocking a premature route-level deterministic replay claim.
mustRemainTrue: canonical replay status remains planned-fixture for traversal-cargo-pressure

phasePlan.objective: Keep the composite facade as reusable cargo/resource/pressure authority while the route translates only climb events and fiction.
requiredProof: route checkpoints still flow through engine.n.genericRouteProgress
cargo/resource deltas flow through engine.n.genericResourceLoop via the composite facade
pressure deltas flow through engine.n.genericPressureLoop via the composite facade
domain snapshots expose routeProgress plus routeCargoExtraction without renderer or browser APIs

phasePlan.objective: Promote traversal-cargo-pressure from planned-fixture only after a browserless replay imports real Core plus ProtoKits, advances fixed ticks, and compares deterministic route/cargo/pressure descriptor digests.
requiredProof: no DOM, Canvas, WebGL, Three.js, pointer lock, browser audio, asset loading, wall-clock, RNG, or animation-frame dependency in reusable kit logic

nextPatchGate: Add a route-level fixed-tick replay that proves route, cargo, pressure, and descriptor digests together before promoting Next Ledge to executable route-domain coverage.
localJsReductionClaim: generic-route-cargo-extraction-kit now centralizes reusable cargo, resource, pressure, and descriptor state; route-local code retains event translation, fiction, browser input, tuning, and presentation
